title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus GPU cluster, exposing the company's lack of vertical integration compared to other frontier AI labs. The analysis argues that the real AI competition is shifting from benchmarks toward control of chips, energy, and datacenter infrastructure.
